rationale: The confirmed US-Iran ceasefire is a qualitative new development that could redirect US diplomatic and military attention away from Ukraine, raising concern about Western support continuity.

top_events.title: US, Iran announce ceasefire agreement; Strait of Hormuz reopening
top_events.summary: A confirmed US-Iran deal may shift Washington's strategic focus and resources away from Ukraine, potentially affecting the pace and volume of Western military and financial support. This is a new qualitative development with uncertain but real implications for Ukraine.

top_events.title: Russian families use AI to 'resurrect' loved ones killed in Ukraine
top_events.summary: A human-interest story about Russian grief over war casualties; no direct military or policy impact on Ukrainian daily life.

top_events.title: Gaza mourns four killed in Israeli strike
top_events.summary: Ongoing Middle East conflict is distant from Ukrainian daily life and has no direct bearing on Ukraine's war situation.
